<!-- Generated by ArcKit /arckit:pages -->
# arckit-test-project-v48-arckit-as-a-service

> Enterprise architecture governance artifacts for `arckit-test-project-v48-arckit-as-a-service`, generated with [ArcKit](https://arckit.org) 4.12.3. This repository contains structured documentation — principles, requirements, stakeholders, risk registers, business cases, architecture decisions, designs, diagrams, traceability matrices, and operational packs — using ArcKit's template-driven workflow and versioned document IDs (`ARC-NNN-TYPE-vX.Y`).

ArcKit maintains a traceability chain: Stakeholders → Goals → Requirements (BR/FR/NFR/INT/DR) → ADRs → HLD → DLD → Operations. Every document follows a standard Document Control header and lives under `projects/NNN-name/` with multi-instance types (ADRs, diagrams) nested in typed subdirectories.

This project contains two routes — **001 ArcKit SaaS** (multi-tenant managed service) and **002 ArcKit Sovereign** (air-gapped customer-controlled deployment) — built on a single codebase per Principle 21.

## Documentation site

- [Dashboard and document viewer](./index.html): Interactive web UI with KPI dashboard, category charts, governance checklist, sidebar navigation, and Mermaid diagram rendering.
- [Manifest](./manifest.json): Machine-readable JSON index of every artifact, guide, and project in this repository.
- [Health](./health.json): Diagnostic health scan output.

## Project status

- 001-arckit-saas: 62% essential coverage · DRAFT (alpha gate pending) · next: ARB sign-off
- 002-arckit-sovereign: 62% essential coverage · DRAFT (alpha gate pending) · next: ARB sign-off
